company: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.
intended_use: The uMR Ultra system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces sagittal, transverse, coronal, and oblique cross sectional images, and spectroscopic images, an
intended_use_full: The uMR Ultra system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces sagittal, transverse, coronal, and oblique cross sectional images, and spectroscopic images, and that display internal anatomical structure and/or function of the head, body and extremities. These images and the physical parameters derived from the images when interpreted by a trained physician yield information that may assist the diagnosis. Contrast agents may be used depending on the region of interest of the scan.
ground_truth: For ACS: fully-sampled k-space data transformed to image space; for DeepRecon: multiple-averaged high-resolution, high-SNR images; clinical evaluation by American Board of Radiologists-certificated physicians
other_metrics: ACS: NRMSE ratio (output/input) < 1; SNR improvement over CS; Resolution improvement over CS; Bland-Altman analysis < 1% bias for image intensity; Structure measurement differences < 5%. DeepRecon: SNR 496.15 vs NADR 343.63; Uniformity difference 0.07%; Intensity difference 0.2%; Structure measurement difference 0%.
